headline: Session 48 exhausted the full audit and innovation queue, unified recovery and runtime authority, secured cloud-save custody, and closed with direct suites, staging, routes, and doctor green.

items.title: rehab-command-authority
items.evidence: One facilities-aware recovery clock now powers three persistent risk/pace plans, dual runtimes, a responsive command surface, and source-derived comeback receipts.

items.title: secure-gist-custody
items.evidence: Credentials are memory/tab-only; legacy persistence is removed; bounded payloads and integrity sidecars gate import.

items.title: lifecycle-coherence-guard
items.evidence: Local FORGE truth is machine-checked, doctor-owned, and protected from the authoritative registry's stale SPARKED value by explicit warning and Ark correction cargo.

items.title: offseason-progress-fence
items.evidence: Camp cuts cannot spin on stale indexes; batched mutations prove progress or emit a truthful stall receipt, restoring practical long simulation.

items.title: authority-preserving-transport
items.evidence: A transient server-busy poll can no longer silently fork an established league into unrelated browser-local state.

followUps.title: email-forwarding-receipt
followUps.evidence: Produce a real received-message receipt for football@playfranchisearchitect.com before any local SPARKED flip.

blockers.title: launch/SPARKED
blockers.evidence: Live routes are green, but email forwarding/copying remains unverified; this does not block the direct-main development checkpoint.

honestyLedger.title: superseded-timeouts
honestyLedger.evidence: Timed wrappers and the initial 17/18 browser result were retained as diagnostic evidence and superseded only by explicit direct zero exits.

honestyLedger.title: registry-drift
honestyLedger.evidence: Authoritative SPARKED is reported as drift, not copied into local truth; signed Ark cargo requests the source correction.

honestyLedger.title: email-proof
honestyLedger.evidence: Brevo credential discovery is not a delivery receipt; launch evidence remains blocked without received-mail proof.

diffStat.insertions: 896 tracked-line additions plus new audit/checker/test artifacts
diffStat.suite: direct Node 358/358; Playwright 18/18; Pages build/smoke; live routes 8/8; sitemap 10/10; secret scan 0; doctor blockingFailing 0; Genius cache 0 open
